acceptance_criteria.given: hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh is invoked with stdin JSON {"tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"killall \"happy\""}}
hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh is invoked with stdin JSON {"tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"pkill -f \"claude\""}}
hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh is invoked with stdin JSON {"tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"kill \"-9\" 1234"}}
hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh is invoked with stdin JSON containing command: codex exec "The hook documentation says killall and claude processes are monitored"
acceptance_criteria.then: exit code is 0 (allowed) — false-positive fix is preserved

acceptance_criteria.given: hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh is invoked with stdin JSON containing command: killall happy
acceptance_criteria.then: exit code is 2 (BLOCKED) — bare unquoted killall still blocked

acceptance_criteria.then: active_tests[] contains exactly 19 entries, and AC17, AC18, and AC19 are present by test_id
